findings.claim_text: FDA career scientists recommended against loosening compounding restrictions on all seven peptides under review at the July 23-24, 2026 meeting.
Wall Street analysts estimate telehealth peptide prescribing could reach $2.2 billion per year, with Hims & Hers potentially capturing up to $440 million.
Hims & Hers Q1 2026 revenue grew just 3.8% year over year to $608.1 million while the company swung to a $92.1 million net loss.
